title: Commerce Tax Code Rates
description: A list of defined tax rates and their associated codes.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the commerce tax code rate.

title.title: Title
title.description: The full name of the commerce tax code rate.

description.title: Description
description.description: The description of the commerce tax code rate.

code.title: Code
code.description: A code that may be used to identify the tax jurisdiction.

defaultCompoundingSequence.title: Default Compounding Sequence
defaultCompoundingSequence.description: The default compounding order in which the tax code rate will be applied.

taxPercentage.title: Tax Percentage
taxPercentage.description: The tax percentage associated with the tax code rate.

taxRebatePercentage.title: Tax Rebate Percentage
taxRebatePercentage.description: The tax rebate percentage associated with the tax code rate.

startOn.title: Start On
startOn.description: The first date that the tax code rate is effective.

endOn.title: End On
endOn.description: The last date that the tax code rate is effective.

taxCodes.title: Tax Codes
taxCodes.description: The tax code(s) which are associated with the commerce tax code rate.

items.title: Tax Codes
items.description: The tax code(s) which are associated with the commerce tax code rate.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Tax Codes.
